title: rubus cryptadenus var. teretiusculus
intro: Rubus cryptadenus var. teretiusculus, also known as the Japanese bramble, is a type of thorny shrub native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus cryptadenus var. teretiusculus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
